package rulecoverage

func PositiveTransactionErrorTranslationDoneInRepositoryAndHandler() string {
    ruleID := "transaction_error_translation_done_in_repository_and_handler"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Both repository and handler layers translating the same transaction errors."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
